title: Georgia Association of Disability Examiners (GADE) — Constitution and Bylaws
description: Combined Constitution and Bylaws of the Georgia Association of Disability Examiners (GADE), a Southeastern Region chapter of the National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE), amended October 2000. The Constitution (Articles I-XIV) covers name, definitions, affiliation, mission statement, membership and privileges, the Delegate Assembly, the Regional Executive Board, the Board of Directors (seven members), officers (President/President-Elect serving as Vice President in year one/Secretary/Treasurer), finances, dues, meetings, bylaws, and amendments. The Bylaws detail membership classes, the Delegate Assembly, regional representation, board powers, officer duties, standing committees, a 20%-of-DAS-employee meeting quorum, August elections, amendments, and parliamentary authority.

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Georgia Chapter
source.title: Constitution and Bylaws of the Georgia Association of Disability Examiners (GADE), Amended October 2000

notes: Authoritative NADE chapter governing document. This .md is the markitdown-normalized conversion of the sibling source file 'Georgias-updated-constitution-and-bylaws.doc' in the same directory; expect conversion artifacts (irregular Markdown heading levels carried from the original Word heading styles). The document is captioned 'AMENDED OCTOBER , 2000', so temporal_coverage start/end are set to 2000. The source URL is the NADE organization site, not a deep link.
